creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: jbeich
Date: Wed Mar  8 06:36:21 UTC 2017
New revision: 435658
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/435658

Log:
  devel/ocl-icd: respect prefix after r435308

  $ clinfo
  Number of platforms                               1
    Platform Name                                   Intel Gen OCL Driver
    Platform Vendor                                 Intel
    Platform Version                                OpenCL 1.2 beignet 1.2
  [...]
  $ pkg upgrade -q
  $ clinfo
  Number of platforms                               0
  $ truss clinfo
  [...]
  open("/etc/OpenCL/vendors",O_RDONLY|O_NONBLOCK|O_DIRECTORY|O_CLOEXEC,022) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
  [...]

  PR:		216739
  Approved by:	portmgr blanket

Changes:
  head/devel/ocl-icd/Makefile
